title: abies fabri subsp. beshanzuensis
intro: Abies fabri subsp. beshanzuensis, also known as Beshanzu fir, is a subspecies of fir tree native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and needles of the Beshanzu fir are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
